steps.assistant_text: Wave-3: 98.57% -> 221/221 EXACT (retracts 'pure register-renumber coloring, permuter-immune'). (1) sp28 flag made a PLAIN local (was volatile): its call-crossing web spills naturally -> un-coalesced sltu t1/sltiu t2 ring pair, home store in the beq delay slot, lw reload at the far use. (2) 7E34/7B2C family recipe on the 0x200 dispatch cluster (pre-scaled offset inline-CSE de-named, elem|0x4D4 swap). (3) Loop body: swapped a1v-before-e statement order (swaps the two chains' temp trios); de-named r2 by embedding the 1CF0 call inside the a1v chain (target reads 1036(v0) directly off the return reg); if(1){} BB-wrap around the vt load + dispatch call flips the vt CSE web a2->v0. (4) Frame 64->72 exact: merged the disjoint web pairs the target shares one variable for - flags+i (both color s1) and busy+off (both s0); a separate i re-splits the s-reg coloring. v/r webs reuse e's name (kills 2 dead homes). Decl order sp28,busy,q,flags,e,r2,a1v ranks q's caller-save spill at 60. ROM cmp clean.

metadata.verification: byte-diff 221/221 vs expected/src/timproc_uso_b5/timproc_uso_b5.c.o + full make RUN_CC_CHECK=0 + cmp tenshoe.z64 baserom.z64 clean + make non_matching_objects exit 0
